scope.selection_note: Codex-only identity cleanup prep after identity186. Scope is entity aliases only. This note avoids already-merged aliases, identity186 proposed ids, identity186 deferred trap ids, alias-as-current-merge-target chains, target-as-current-alias chains, and current do-not-merge pairs.
scope.write_limit: Only this review note was written. No identity overrides, LOG.md, manifest, submissions, canonical outputs, DB, wiki, or materialized outputs were intentionally edited.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records identify the Permanent Citizens Advisory Committee to the MTA. The alias is a single-source Webster CAC mention; the target is the richer PCAC record with the same long-form name and acronym support.

proposal_guards: Alias and target must both be present in current canonical entity records.
Alias must not already be present as an override alias.
Target must not itself be a current override alias.
Alias must not be a current merge target, avoiding alias-target chains.
Pair must not appear in current do-not-merge guardrails.
Alias and target must not be used in identity186 proposed aliases or identity186 deferred trap ids.
commands_run_for_this_prep: rg read-only inspection of review notes, package helpers, source blocks, and repo paths
jq read-only inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
bun --eval read-only validateRepo() extraction of duplicate_global_identity entity rows
bun --eval readCanonicalRecords() plus local guard checks over merges.json, do-not-merge.json, identity186 ids, and candidate evidence refs
